warnings.description: The distance from Sangüesa to Monreal is over 27km. This is not achievable with your current distance preferences. Consider using the Lumbier route to break the journey.@en
The time from Jaca to Monasterio Nuevo de San Juan de Péna is over 6 hours. This is not achievable with your current time preferences.@en
The time from Lumbier to Monreal is over 6 hours. This is not achievable with your current time preferences.@en
